title: Anthropic says Trump admin has lifted export controls on Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5
summary_full: The U.S. Department of Commerce lifted the export controls on Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models
summary_public: The U.S. Department of Commerce lifted the export controls on Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models
